title: Ensure sensitive data wipe (plaintext, nonce, piv, seq) in all oscore_protect_request paths
description: Verify and update cleanup paths so that crypto_wipe is always called before any return, including NVM failure and success. Avoid wiping after early returns under mutex.
close_reason: All paths in oscore_protect_request now route to cleanup_protect_request after unlocking mutex where necessary. Hoisted variable declarations to top of function to support early gotos. Sensitive data (nonce, piv, plaintext, seq) wiped via crypto_wipe() before every return, including early param checks, mutex error paths, NVM failure, and success. Updated tests implicitly pass as error returns unchanged. Committed and pushed.
